text:
Team USA has landed a number of medals from the track and field events at the recently concluded Paris Olympics 2024. The major medal haul for USA from these events, helped them rise to the top-3 bracket in the Paris Olympics medal tally. Here's all you need to know about some of the stars from Team USA who brought accolades to the country.
